---
title: "indicator_species_analysis"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(indicspecies)
library(dplyr)
library(vegan)
library(ggpubr)
library(microbiome)
library(indicspecies)

metadata = read.delim('../Datasets/radiation_lab_metadata_improved.txt', row.names = 1)
taxonomy = read.delim('../Datasets/taxonomy.tsv', row.names = 1) 
counts = read.delim('../Datasets/feature-table.txt', skip=1, row.names=1, check.names = FALSE)
tree = read_tree('../Datasets/tree.nwk')

taxonomy_formatted = taxonomy %>%
  separate(col = Taxon, 
           into = c('Domain','Phylum','Class','Order',
                    'Family','Genus','Species'),
           sep=';', fill='right') %>% 
select(-Confidence) %>% 
as.matrix()

counts_formatted = counts %>% as.matrix()

view(metadata)
meta_names = read.delim('../Datasets/radiation_lab_metadata_improved.txt',row.names = 1) %>% names()
meta_data = read.delim('../Datasets/radiation_lab_metadata_improved.txt',row.names = 1) 
table(metadata[2,]== meta_data[1,])

ps = phyloseq(sample_data(metadata),
              otu_table(counts_formatted, taxa_are_rows = T),
              tax_table(taxonomy_formatted),
              tree)

saveRDS(ps,'phyloseq_taxonomy.rds')
```



```{r}
ps_genus = tax_glom(ps, 'Genus')
ps_relab = transform(ps_genus, 'compositional')
ps_filt = filter_taxa(ps_relab, function(x) mean(x) > 0.001, TRUE)

phyloseq_object = microbiome::transform(ps_relab, 'compositional')

ps_filt = filter_taxa(ps, function(x) mean(x) > 0.001, TRUE)

isa_output = multipatt(t(otu_table(phyloseq_object)),
                       cluster = ps_filt@sam_data$Time_of_Collection_categorical,
                       control = how(nperm = 999))

summary(isa_output, indvalcomp = TRUE)

statistics = as.data.frame(isa_output$sign)

```
